$schema: Source of truth for AERIS brand tokens. Locked palette per docs/AERIS_Visual_Brand_Guidelines_v0.3_DRAFT.md §04. `color` is the canonical five-colour brand palette (plus text-body) — both consumers (mobile/src/constants/theme.ts and aeris_websitev3/styles/theme.css) MUST mirror these exactly. `support-color` is mobile-only convenience variants (lighter/darker navies, cream variants, the off-white paper bg) that verify.mjs checks against mobile only. Run tokens/verify.mjs after editing.
